product.name: DeKoi
firstCreativeLoop: create or import a companion or bundle
start a Messenger thread or Roleplay scene
save into DeKoi-owned local records visibly
configure a Connection only when needed

northStar: Keep a pond, not a platform: a lantern-lit studio over dark water where every story lives in the user's own files, every control feels shaped by hand, koi and ripples move only in open water, and dense creative work happens on calm opaque surfaces.

experiencePillars.name: ownershipYouCanSee
experiencePillars.rule: Save state, storage destination, and active provider are calm visible facts, detailed on demand, never buried or shouted.

experiencePillars.name: livingPondQuietly
experiencePillars.rule: Ambient motion lives at the edges and in open water; it never performs while the user reads or types.

experiencePillars.name: depthWithoutFog
experiencePillars.rule: Depth comes from stacked opaque materials and hairline borders, not blur, translucency over text, or gradient haze.

experiencePillars.name: handmadeWarmth
experiencePillars.rule: Controls feel shaped: pill buttons, soft radii, ink-on-lantern fills, serif identity moments, brush motifs used sparingly.

experiencePillars.name: twoDoorsIntoTheWater
experiencePillars.rule: Creating and resuming threads are always the most obvious actions; configuration never blocks the first thread.

experiencePillars.name: siblingsNotTwins
experiencePillars.rule: Messenger is the quick row-based surface; Roleplay is the staged bubble-based surface; same pond, different depths, no cloned costumes.

experiencePillars.name: deepToolsAreKept
experiencePillars.rule: Provider, storage, and repair surfaces get the same craft as the hero: aligned forms, readable logs, explicit dangerous actions.

abyss.role: app backdrop only; deepest layer; hosts backdrop gradients and watermark

water.role: shell chrome regions: waterline, bank, tide

shallow.role: secondary panels, thread headers, drawer chrome

raise.role: primary work surfaces, cards, editors, thread bodies

reed.role: strong borders, scrollbar thumbs, control outlines

koi.role: primary action, current creative state, character-side identity warmth; never a panel background

koiHot.role: koi hover and active; gradient high end

jade.role: runtime health, calm support, focus outlines, persona-side identity, presence, secondary living motion

amber.role: warnings, recency, unsaved and pending attention, story warmth; states that resolve, never permanent decoration

foam.role: primary readable text and strong icons

mistDim.role: tertiary non-essential metadata and disabled text only; about 3:1 on raise, never sole carrier of information

belly.role: warm paper highlight in artwork and rare warm emphasis; not a general text color

ink.role: text and glyphs on koi, jade, or amber fills; foam fails contrast on accent fills

colorProhibitions: no koi-tinted backgrounds larger than a control
jade and amber are semantic, never random decoration
no accent-on-accent pairings; accents meet only through ink or dark waters
gradient fills limited to koi ramp on primary actions and jade ramp on Roleplay equivalents
no gradient text outside the hero wordmark
no unnamed hex values; new hues require a named token and written role first

familyRoles.display: identity at thresholds: hero wordmark, surface titles, empty-state headings, Roleplay scene headers; never body copy, labels, buttons, or metadata
familyRoles.ui: all dense work: messages, forms, catalogs, settings, logs
familyRoles.mono: keys, URLs, and file paths only

body.use: default UI text, forms, catalogs, logs

message.use: message body; 1.5 in Messenger, 1.6 in Roleplay; never below 13px at default scale

caption.use: role chips and date separators; smallest legal text

elevation.model: elevation is a step up the opaque material stack, not a shadow
elevation.floatingShadowUse: care drawer, menus, dialogs, and the hero mark glow only

rules: app identity, global actions, window controls
never grows into a toolbar junk drawer
icon rail for places
active place marked by accent plus shape, never color alone
labels via tooltip or expansion
saved Messenger and Roleplay threads with kind, title, recency
collapsible with a visible reopen affordance
hosts home, threads, catalogs, editors
home content centered at max 920px
threads manage their own text measure
runtime and provider health, storage and save state, quiet background activity
always current, never nagging
Pond Care sections: General, Appearance, Behavior, Generation, Data & Backup
glides over the pond and carries the floating shadow
becomes a scrimmed overlay below 1280px
docks inside the pond region beside a thread
not a second care drawer
at 960 to 1280 the care drawer overlays with scrim
at 720 to 960 the shoal overlays from the left
below 720 the bank condenses to essential places, one panel at a time, thumb-sized controls, tide collapses to status dot plus sheet

density.compactRule: compact tightens padding on care and settings surfaces only; never shrinks type below scale minimums
density.catalogs: card grids or rows with one line of name plus one line of metadata; browsing surfaces, not spreadsheets
density.settings: single-column labeled fields in bordered sections with plain headings
density.providerForms: densest allowed forms; visible labels, inline validation, plain-language descriptions; secrets write-only
density.storageLogs: table-like rows at body size with status chips and adjacent inline repair or reload actions
density.messenger: compact grouped message rows with small gaps
density.roleplay: roomier vertical rhythm with air around bubbles in one calm center column

messenger.purpose: fast familiar DM-style character chat; message-first, scan-first
messenger.visualDensity: compact grouped rows; dense but breathing
messenger.layoutPattern: left-gutter rows: 40px avatar column plus content column; sender name, role chip, timestamp on group head; consecutive same-sender messages grouped under one header with hover timestamp
avatarRules: small functional round avatars with hairline identity ring
koi-tinted ring for companions, jade-tinted for the user persona
empty alt when the display name is adjacent text
bubbleRules: no ornate bubbles; rows sit directly on the raise surface
subtle full-row hover and focus tint
no per-message gradients, mood art, or decorative chrome
metadataRules: timestamps and date separators in mist at meta and caption sizes
date separators as centered caption pills on hairlines
per-turn generation detail behind a disclosure, not printed on every turn

stateTreatments.user: jade-ringed avatar plus name; same row layout as companions, never mirrored
stateTreatments.pending: quiet jade shimmer-dot row with Generating text and reserved layout space
stateTreatments.error: amber or koi bordered inline notice on the failed turn with retry adjacent
stateTreatments.generated: visually ordinary once complete; provenance in disclosure

providerRuntimeRules: active Connection, runtime health, and save state visible in tide strip and thread header dot
plain product wording such as Saved to desktop, Generating, Connection disconnected
no transport or plumbing language in default UI
accessibilityRules: hover actions are also focus-revealed and always visible on touch
message text at message scale, 1.5 line height, 60 to 75ch measure
full keyboard traversal including message actions
state never conveyed by color alone
avoid: Discord clone layout, server or channel metaphors, cloned spacing, iconography, or copy
mood art or animation behind message text
anything that slows scanning a 500-turn thread

roleplay.purpose: staged scene-aware character roleplay; a scene being kept, adjacent to visual-novel staging without becoming game UI
roleplay.visualDensity: roomier than Messenger; generous vertical rhythm; one calm center column
roleplay.layoutPattern: centered scene column with max 680px text measure; avatars staged at outer edges, cast left, user persona right; optional scene header with display serif title, cast strip, and scene status
avatarRules: larger staged avatars, 36 to 44px, at the column edges
identity carried by rings, chips, and speaker lines, never bubble background floods
accessible name equals display name when no adjacent text
bubbleRules: real bubble containers: raise-on-raise cards with hairline border tinted by speaker kind
koi-family borders for companions, jade-family for personas
sm radius, roomy padding, one border and one background, no glows or tails
speakerIdentityRules: speaker line above the bubble with name, role, and optional presence
cast strip in scene header shows who is present
identity accents stay in borders, rings, and chips
narrationRules: narration and action beats render without avatar, italic or serif-inflected message text, jade-tinted left rule, slightly inset column
spoken dialogue stays upright inside bubbles
out-of-character notes step out of the scene: plain shallow row with an OOC caption chip and no theatrical styling
metadataRules: timestamps at meta size on the speaker line
system and runtime notices use the shared quiet notice language above the entries

stateTreatments.dialogue: bordered bubble keyed to speaker kind
stateTreatments.narration: inset avatar-free beat with jade-tinted rule
stateTreatments.ooc: plain shallow row with OOC caption chip
stateTreatments.system: full-width quiet notice; amber warning, koi error
stateTreatments.pending: jade shimmer-dot entry with reserved space
stateTreatments.error: bordered inline notice on the failed entry with retry adjacent

continuityRippleRules: Ripple updates render as compact jade-accented seam markers summarizing what shifted
expandable in place with full state in the Ripple Dock
reads as rings on water, never as game HUD
accessibilityRules: edit, retry, branch, delete on the shared hover and focus pill pattern anchored to the speaker line
text column stays generous, calm, and skimmable
state never conveyed by color alone
avoid: narrowing the text column for staging
busy bubble chrome or per-character color floods
styling that tires the reader over long sessions

sharedConversationRules.generationState: generation status is always discoverable in tide and thread header, worded in product language with role=status semantics
sharedConversationRules.saveState: save destination and saved or unsaved state visible at a glance; jade saved, amber pending or unsaved
sharedConversationRules.errorState: errors are inline and adjacent to the failed turn with role=alert, one clear next action, dismissible where safe
sharedConversationRules.reducedMotion: system preference and in-app motion setting both freeze ambient and celebratory motion; every animated cue has a static text, icon, or color equivalent
sharedConversationRules.keyboardTouch: full keyboard traversal, visible focus, hover affordances mirrored on focus and always visible on touch, targets at least 40px on coarse pointers
sharedConversationRules.longSessionReadability: opaque calm backgrounds, stable line lengths, no flicker on stream updates, scroll position respected on regenerate
sharedConversationRules.atmosphereBoundary: pond life surrounds the conversation in backdrop, seams, and empty states; never behind message text
sharedConversationRules.legacyBoundary: no prior-project message layouts, prompt labels, mode chrome, or UI copy; requirements written in DeKoi terms first

button.primary: koi gradient fill koiHot to koiDeep, ink text, md radius, min 36px tall, 40px on touch; Roleplay primary may use the jade ramp
button.secondary: raise fill, reed border, foam text
button.quiet: borderless mist text gaining jade tint on hover
rules: one primary button per view region
round or pill with hairline border and transparent-to-dark fill
hover and focus shift to jade-tinted border and tint
min hit area 24px with spacing, 40px on touch
always has an accessible name
dark wells on raise with sm to md radius and hairline border
focus is jade border plus soft 1px jade ring
labels above, help or error text below with icon
textareas auto-grow to a max then scroll
no placeholder-as-label
opaque materials per the surface table
drawers glide at 340ms and carry the app's one floating shadow
labeled close affordance and focus trap while open
raise on shallow or hairline-separated rows, md radius for cards
hover lightens border and tint, never scales
one-line name plus one-line meta with ellipsis truncation
whole row clickable with distinct secondary-action affordance
pill outlines at caption or meta size
selected state is accent border plus tint fill plus foam text plus a non-color cue
segmented controls are chips in a hairline-bordered track
active place gets accent tint, edge marker, and label
inactive places are mist icons
never tint alone
dot plus label pattern
jade healthy or connected or saved, amber pending or attention, koi error or blocked, mist idle
dots never appear without an accessible text equivalent
gutter rows with grouping per messageDesign.messenger
quiet pill action row on hover and focus, always visible on touch
inline delete confirm within the row
bordered bubbles keyed to speaker kind per messageDesign.roleplay
speaker line above with name, role, presence
narration, OOC, and ripple-seam variants
round, object-fit cover, hairline identity ring: koi companion, jade persona
monogram fallback on tinted well
empty alt when a visible name is adjacent
presence badges pair with reachable text
meta size in mist
relative time with absolute on hover or focus
mistDim only for redundant metadata
pending shows jade dot-shimmer plus Generating text with reserved layout space
generated content is visually ordinary once complete; provenance in disclosure
errors are bordered inline notices: amber recoverable, koi failure, one clear next action
preview before replace and automatic pre-import backup stated in the UI
progress and result rows
destructive actions in koi with inline typed or explicit confirm
paths and keys in monospace, secrets write-only with save, check, clear affordances
same tokens and radii as the rest of the app; no engineering-mode styling

allowedUse: center of the hero living mark
logoPng.overuseRisk: repetition in chrome dilutes the hero moment; use the wordmark or koi-mark.svg elsewhere
logoPng.accessibility: static; empty alt inside the decorative hero because the adjacent wordmark names the app

koiMarkSvg.purpose: line-drawn koi glyph for small identity
koiMarkSvg.overuseRisk: becoming a bullet point or list decoration
koiMarkSvg.accessibility: static; aria-hidden when adjacent to the app name

allowedUse: fixed full-viewport backdrop at 0.05 opacity or less, exactly once
koiBgSvg.overuseRisk: any second placement, opacity raise, or use inside panels
koiBgSvg.accessibility: static; must remain invisible under opaque text surfaces

allowedUse: section seams on home and designed empty states, at most one per view
lotusDividerSvg.overuseRisk: wallpapering every section break; it marks thresholds, not paragraphs

koiSprite.purpose: shared inline SVG koi and fish symbols for the living mark
allowedUse: referenced via use elements by the hero and designed empty states
koiSprite.overuseRisk: scattering swimming koi across working surfaces
koiSprite.accessibility: tail animation freezes under reduced motion

pondEye.purpose: the signature living mark: logo, still rings, ripple pings, orbiting koi in koi, jade, amber
pondEye.overuseRisk: reuse as spinner, loader, or button is forbidden; miniaturization into chrome is forbidden
pondEye.accessibility: renders a designed still composition under reduced motion; aria-hidden art with the heading carrying the name

caustics.purpose: ambient light texture in the deep water
allowedUse: two fixed backdrop layers at 0.5 opacity or less
caustics.overuseRisk: adding layers, raising opacity, or placing inside panels
caustics.accessibility: drift stops entirely under reduced motion or motion off

ambient.character: slow cycles of 4 seconds or more, low contrast, water-like drift and ripple

hoverLimits: no scale pops on rows or messages

celebratory.allowed: single non-looping ripple ring confirming a meaningful save, import, or first-thread moment

reducedMotion.becomesStatic: hero renders a designed still composition with koi placed on rings, mark and wordmark intact
reducedMotion.transitions: collapse to near-zero duration; hover reveals become instant
reducedMotion.invariant: no state is conveyed by animation alone; static text, icon, or color equivalents always remain

placementRules: koi swim only in the hero and at most one designed empty state
ripples ping in the hero and may fire once near a control as confirmation
caustics exist only as the two fixed backdrop layers
no motion behind long text ever

notes: foam on raise is about 12:1 and mist on raise about 5:1; both pass
mistDim is about 3:1 on raise and restricted to decorative or redundant text
text on accent fills uses ink, about 7:1 on koi

accessibility.focus: 2px accent outline at 2px offset on focus-visible everywhere; never removed; drawers and dialogs trap and restore focus
accessibility.keyboard: full traversal of shell, threads, and message actions; hover-revealed actions are focus-revealed; composer submit and escape documented in the hint line
accessibility.touchTarget: minimum 40px on coarse pointers; hover-only affordances become always visible; scrolling never fights the message list
accessibility.nonColorState: every state pairs color with an icon, label, or shape
accessibility.reducedMotion: honored via system preference and in-app setting per motionRules.reducedMotion
accessibility.longSessions: opaque reading surfaces, whole type scale multiplies by the user font scale, stable measures, no flashing beyond the quiet pending cue
accessibility.denseText: nothing below 10.5px; logs and forms at body size; compact density tightens spacing, never type size
accessibility.messageReadability: measure, line height, and grouping rules are requirements, not aesthetics
accessibility.avatars: empty alt beside visible names; otherwise accessible name equals display name; presence conveyed in text, not dot-only
accessibility.statusSemantics: role=status for progress, role=alert for failures; errors keep a visible next action; toasts never carry vanishing information

principles: calm, direct, lightly atmospheric only at thresholds
theme words name places and records; verbs stay plain
status and errors are concrete: what happened, where things stand, what to do next
no blame, no jokes in error states
voice.messengerLabels: plain utilitarian: New thread, Copy, Retry, Edit, Delete
voice.roleplayLabels: scene-aware where it clarifies: Set the scene, Continue scene, Branch from here; primary actions remain instantly legible
voice.legacyRule: prior-project mode names, prompt labels, and interaction copy are never reused

dos: keep Messenger fast, familiar, and restrained: rows, not costumes
let Roleplay carry more character identity and staging: bubbles, speaker lines, scene headers, ripple seams
preserve the orbiting-koi hero as the singular living mark with a designed reduced-motion still
keep dense text on calm opaque surfaces with atmosphere in the water around them
make provider, runtime, and save state visible in tide and header language without exposing machinery
use the material stack abyss to water to shallow to raise for depth instead of shadows and blur
give Connections and Data & Backup the same craft as the hero
pair every color-coded state with an icon or label
donts: do not turn Messenger into a Discord clone in layout, metaphors, spacing, iconography, or copy
do not make Roleplay so theatrical that long scenes become hard to read
do not put animated water, swimming koi, or ornamental texture behind long text
do not use koi orange as panel wallpaper, page tint, or large background fills
do not copy prior-project mode chrome, prompt wording, schemas, or layouts
do not miniaturize or repurpose the living mark as a spinner, button, or repeated ornament
do not add unnamed hex values, new hues, or accent-on-accent pairings
do not hide errors in toasts or bury retry behind menus
do not let compact density shrink type below scale minimums
do not ship hover-only affordances without focus and touch equivalents

implementationStages.name: token and doc sync
items: align pond-tokens.css with the color, motion, opacity, and type scale tokens
add the ink token and named motion and opacity variables
re-cut the stray presence green to jade
verify DESIGN.json values match CSS one-to-one

implementationStages.name: hero and shell consistency
items: refine the living mark: ring spacing, koi drawing, wake subtlety, designed reduced-motion still
normalize waterline, bank, shoal, and tide materials and borders to the material stack
give the care drawer its floating shadow and scrimmed overlay behavior at narrow widths

implementationStages.name: Messenger and Roleplay differentiation
items: implement Messenger grouping, gutter rhythm, and quiet action pills
implement Roleplay scene header, speaker lines, narration, OOC, and ripple-seam variants with staged avatars
raise message body type to the documented scale
unify pending and error turn treatments across both surfaces

implementationStages.name: catalog, settings, storage, and provider polish
items: apply density rules to Companions, Personas, Lorebooks, Presets, Agents, and Media catalogs
rebuild Connections forms to labeled-field standards with secret-safe affordances
bring Data & Backup logs to readable-row and inline-action standards with honest destructive confirms

implementationStages.name: accessibility and motion audit
items: contrast pass on every token pairing in use
keyboard walk of the shell and both thread surfaces
touch-target audit at coarse pointer sizes
reduced-motion visual QA of hero, caustics, and celebratory ripples
screen-reader pass on status, alerts, avatars, and the living mark
